name: Tanner Asset Management ADM GE Fund SA - Tam ACPI Private Debt Fondo De Inversion Fund
summary: Tanner Asset Management ADM GE Fund SA - Tam ACPI Private Debt Fondo De Inversion Fund is a private debt investment fund. It is managed by Tanner Asset Management ADM GE Fund SA and invests in private debt instruments through the Tam ACPI structure.
